generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance GantryEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor measuring position of gantry crane components (bridge, trolley, hoist) with high temporal resolution (1kHz)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance LoadCellSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load cell measuring payload weight with 100Hz sampling rate for real-time load monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadWeightDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneImuSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IMU sensor measuring acceleration and angular velocity of crane components for dynamic behavior analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneMotionDataTransmitted
]

instance ControllerSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing real-time controller output signals (PWM, voltage commands) for closed-loop validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerCommandDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensors (temperature, humidity) monitoring operational conditions affecting crane performance."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance GantryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryEncoderSensor
]

instance LoadWeightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LoadCellSensor
]

instance CraneMotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneImuSensor
]

instance ControllerCommandDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerSignalSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Denavit-Hartenberg parameterized kinematic model of gantry crane with forward/inverse kinematics capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicSimulationEnabler, ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance DynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based dynamic model including actuator saturation, collision detection, and flexible cable effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicsSimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "PID and MPC control models with adaptive gain scheduling for real-time crane operation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationEnabler, RealTimeControlEnabler
]

instance GantryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series position data from encoders with 1kHz resolution for trajectory analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler, HistoricalDataLoggingEnabler
]

instance LoadWeightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Payload weight measurements at 100Hz for load capacity monitoring and safety validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadWeightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler, ControlOptimizationEnabler
]

instance CraneMotionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration and angular velocity data for dynamic behavior analysis and model validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneMotionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicsSimulationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance ControllerCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time controller output signals for closed-loop validation and control performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerCommandDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler, RealTimeControlEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational environment data (temperature, humidity) affecting crane performance."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicsSimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance HistoricalTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Archived trajectory data with metadata for retrospective analysis and model training."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalDataLoggingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance KinematicSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python/PyKinematics-based kinematic simulation engine for forward/inverse kinematics calculations."
    DTDFVocab:enables KinematicValidationService, TrajectoryPlanningService
]

instance PhysicsSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Gazebo/CoppeliaSim physics engine for collision detection and dynamic behavior simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicsValidationService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink and SciPy-based control optimization framework for PID/MPC tuning."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance RealTimeControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS Control framework for real-time execution of optimized control algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering and Bayesian updating framework for real-time model-plant synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB-based time-series database with automated feature extraction capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Plotly Dash/Three.js-based visualization framework for real-time and historical data presentation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework (SciKit-Learn, TensorFlow) for anomaly detection and root-cause analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance DataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS pub/sub and Node-RED-based event-driven data pipeline for real-time sensor data aggregation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance ModelicaSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modelica-based physics modeling for flexible cable and backlash dynamics simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicsValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance KinematicValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating kinematic model accuracy through real-time comparison with physical measurements."
    DTDFVocab:provides KinematicAccuracyInsight
]

instance PhysicsValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating dynamic model accuracy through physics-based residual analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicAccuracyInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time adjustment of control parameters based on operational constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlParametersAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing data-driven corrections for unmodeled dynamics using reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance RealTimeControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing optimized control algorithms in real-time for crane operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeControlExecutionAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing real-time model-plant synchronization with automated discrepancy detection."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelPlantSynchronizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service storing and querying high-resolution sensor data with automated feature extraction."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 2D/3D dashboards with real-time telemetry and historical playback."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationDashboardInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service detecting hardware/software faults through supervised/unsupervised learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service aggregating and streaming sensor data from physical crane to Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataStreamInsight
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal trajectories minimizing energy consumption or cycle time."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance KinematicAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of kinematic model accuracy with deviation metrics from physical measurements."
]

instance DynamicAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Physics-based validation of dynamic model accuracy through energy conservation checks."
]

instance OptimalControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of PID/MPC parameters based on real-time operational constraints."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven compensation for unmodeled dynamics using reinforcement learning policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeControlExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of optimized control commands with 100ms latency for closed-loop operation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelPlantSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison between Digital Twin predictions and physical measurements with automated flagging of inconsistencies."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured storage and queryable metadata of sensor data with automated feature extraction for degradation patterns."
]

instance VisualizationDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of crane motion with dynamic annotations and event-driven alerts."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of hardware/software faults with root-cause analysis through causal graphs."
]

instance SensorDataStreamInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time aggregation of sensor data from physical crane components with event-driven updates."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectories minimizing energy consumption or cycle time with real-time adjustments."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this system is mediated by the **Control Application**, which translates digital commands into physical actions for the **Physical Crane**. **Command types** include trajectory setpoints (generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**) and manual overrides via the **Human Machine Interface (HMI)**. **Control message formats** are not explicitly detailed but are assumed to be structured payloads (e.g., JSON or binary) transmitted via the **Physical Crane Interface** to the crane controllers. **Validation and authentication** mechanisms are not described, though the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly ensures command fidelity by comparing simulated vs. executed trajectories. **Feedback systems** rely on the **Logging Application**, which streams real-time state data back to the Digital Twin for closed-loop control. **Conflict resolution** is not explicitly addressed, but the **Control Application** likely prioritizes higher-authority commands (e.g., trajectory overrides from the **Trajectory Generator** over manual HMI inputs). **Command execution confirmation** is inferred via the **Continuous Validation Service**, which flags discrepancies between planned and actual trajectories, triggering operator alerts via the **Dashboard** (Grafana)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system exemplars exhibit an **ad-hoc orchestration pattern** with **loose coupling** between components, avoiding commercial digital twin frameworks. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar relies on a **hybrid architecture** combining:
  - **InfluxDB** (time-series database) for structured data storage,
  - **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for asynchronous event-driven communication,
  - **Virtual Machines (VMs)** with prerecorded data for offline behavioral adaptation.
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses a **Microsoft Azure-based pipeline** with **AutomationML** for model-driven engineering, integrating **Raspberry Pi sensor data** into a **cloud-hosted digital twin** for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction. Both exemplars emphasize **domain-specific orchestration** (agricultural/construction) with **containerization/virtualization** for reproducibility. The **lab-scale gantry crane** (logistics/CPS domain) follows a similar **ad-hoc approach**, leveraging the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization but lacks explicit details on **resource management** or **system-wide coordination protocols**. No mention of **service meshes, microservices orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), or standardized Digital Twin constellations** (e.g., OMG DTF) is provided."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral fidelity**, where both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin dynamically adjust based on real-time feedback. Validation is implied through **prerecorded data** in virtual machine images, though explicit methods (e.g., verification protocols) are not detailed. The **Air Quality Management** system focuses on **model-driven engineering** for high-fidelity digital twin representations, with **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** applications serving as validation mechanisms. Uncertainty quantification is not explicitly addressed, but the use of **AutomationML** suggests structured model validation. Error detection/correction is inferred via **real-time synchronization** between physical sensors and digital models, with **Microsoft Azure tools** potentially enabling cloud-based anomaly detection. Quality assurance processes are ad-hoc, relying on **containerization/virtualization** for reproducibility. The **gantry crane** system lacks fidelity/validity specifics but aligns with the broader **C4 Model-driven architecture**, implying modular validation through software-hardware integration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s technical connection** infrastructure leverages a **service-oriented architecture** with the following key elements:
  - **Communication Protocols**: Implicitly includes **MQTT** (via the **MQTT Broker**) for lightweight, publish-subscribe messaging between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator** → **Control Application**). Other protocols (e.g., TCP/IP for database access) are assumed but not specified.
  - **Network Topology**: A **star topology** centered on the **MQTT Broker**, with services (e.g., **Simulation Service**, **Dashboard**) subscribing to relevant topics. The **Database** (TimescaleDB) is likely accessed via direct connections from services.
  - **Bandwidth/Latency**: Critical for real-time operations; the **Trajectory Generator** and **Continuous Validation Service** require **low-latency** (<100ms) communication to ensure trajectory accuracy. The **Logging Application** may tolerate slightly higher latency for non-critical data.
  - **Reliability/Redundancy**: Not explicitly detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implies fault tolerance by detecting and alerting on trajectory deviations. Redundancy mechanisms (e.g., backup MQTT brokers) are not mentioned.
  - **Security Protocols**: Not specified, though the use of a **TimescaleDB** (with potential authentication) and **MQTT** (which can support TLS) suggests basic security measures are in place. No encryption or access control details are provided."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s hosting and deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise** (co-located with the **Physical Crane**), as implied by the lack of cloud references and the real-time constraints of the system. Key details include:
  - **Hosting Platform**: Local servers or edge devices running the six Digital Twin containers (**Database**, **Dashboard**, **Trajectory Generator Service**, etc.), with the **Physical Crane Interface** and **Control Application** likely deployed on the same network.
  - **Computational Requirements**: The **Trajectory Generator Service** and **Simulation Service** require sufficient CPU/GPU resources to model crane kinematics and simulate trajectories in real time. The **Continuous Validation Service** demands low-latency processing for distance metric calculations.
  - **Storage Requirements**: The **TimescaleDB** stores time-series data (e.g., crane states, trajectories) with high write throughput from the **Logging Application**. No specific storage capacity is mentioned.
  - **Scalability Mechanisms**: Not explicitly addressed, but the modular **container-based architecture** (C4 Model) suggests horizontal scaling could be implemented by replicating services (e.g., additional **Trajectory Generator** instances).
  - **Deployment Models**: Primarily **monolithic deployment** for the Digital Twin (all containers co-located), though the **container abstraction** (C4 Model) implies potential for microservices-based scaling. **Availability/Redundancy Assurance**: Implicit via the **Continuous Validation Service**, which ensures operational integrity by monitoring trajectory fidelity. No high-availability clustering or failover mechanisms are described."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **limited but domain-specific horizontal integration** with external systems:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for internal data exchange, but no explicit **interoperability standards** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) or **enterprise system dependencies** are mentioned. The use of **virtual machines with prerecorded data** suggests **offline-capable** operation with minimal external integration.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Leverages **AutomationML** for **model-driven digital twin engineering** and **Microsoft Azure tools** for cloud-based pipeline execution, implying integration with **Azure IoT services** or **Azure Data Lake** for large-scale data processing. The exemplar’s **Raspberry Pi sensor layer** may interface with **standard IoT protocols** (e.g., MQTT, HTTP), but specifics are omitted. No mention of **cross-Digital Twin integration** (e.g., federated twins) or **enterprise ERP/MES systems**.
  - **Lab-scale gantry crane**: No details on **external system integration** are provided beyond its **C4 Model architecture visualization**. The context implies a **cyber-physical systems (CPS) focus**, but dependencies on **logistics software (e.g., WMS, TMS)** or **industrial protocols (e.g., PROFINET)** are not documented.
  The exemplars collectively avoid **standardized interoperability frameworks**, relying instead on **ad-hoc, domain-specific integrations** with minimal cross-system dependencies."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems exhibit partial adherence to **industry standards and interoperability frameworks**, with the following specifics:
  - **AutomationML**: The *Air Quality Management* exemplar explicitly uses **AutomationML** for Digital Twin representation, a **standardized modeling language** for automation and control systems (IEC 62714). This ensures interoperability with other engineering tools and systems.
  - **Cloud Platforms**: The *Air Quality Management* exemplar leverages **Microsoft Azure tools**, which may align with **Azure-specific standards** (e.g., Azure IoT Hub for device connectivity, Azure Digital Twins for framework-level standardization). However, no broader **industry certification** (e.g., ISO 23247 for Digital Twins) is mentioned.
  - **Open-Source Dissemination**: All exemplars are hosted on **GitHub**, suggesting compliance with **open-source licensing** (e.g., MIT, Apache) and **version control standards** (Git). This facilitates reproducibility but does not guarantee adherence to proprietary Digital Twin frameworks.
  - **Interoperability**: The use of **message brokers (ActiveMQ)** and **time-series databases (InfluxDB)** in *GreenhouseDT* indicates adherence to **open protocols** (e.g., AMQP for messaging, InfluxDB Line Protocol for data ingestion). However, no explicit **standardized APIs** (e.g., OPC UA, FIWARE) are referenced for cross-system communication.
  - **Domain-Specific Standards**: The *Air Quality Management* exemplar targets **construction engineering** and **virus spread prevention**, which may involve **building automation standards** (e.g., ASHRAE 62.1 for ventilation) or **health/safety regulations** (e.g., WHO guidelines), though these are not explicitly cited in the documents."
]
